whyus.title: Why Choose Us?
whyus.subtitle: A trusted partner for dental professionals in Morocco for over 10 years
whyus.quality_desc: All our products are CE certified and compliant with international dental health standards.
whyus.delivery_desc: Express delivery throughout Morocco. Stock available for urgent orders.
whyus.sav_desc: A technical team available to assist you with the installation and maintenance of your equipment.
whyus.catalog_desc: Over 500 product references, from consumables to complete dental equipment.

services.page_subtitle: Complete solutions for dental professionals in Morocco
services.s1_desc: We offer a complete range of dental consumables and materials: composites, alginates, cements, hygiene products, single-use items and much more. All the essential references for your daily practice.
services.s2_desc: Turbines, scalers, micromotors, dental units, autoclaves and X-ray equipment. We distribute the world's leading brands with installation and commissioning included.
services.s3_desc: Our qualified technical team intervenes quickly for preventive and corrective maintenance of your equipment. Maintenance contracts available to ensure the continuity of your activity.
services.s4_desc: We organize training sessions on new products and equipment. Our technical delegates accompany your teams for optimal and safe handling.
services.s5_desc: Fast delivery to all cities in Morocco. Orders processed within 24h, careful packaging for fragile equipment. Real-time order tracking.
services.cta_sub: Contact our team to discuss your specific needs.

about.page_subtitle: Your trusted partner in dental supplies for over 10 years
about.story_title: Born from a passion for oral health
about.story_p1: Founded in Marrakech, AT Dental was born from the desire to offer Moroccan dental professionals easy access to the best products and equipment on the world market.
about.story_p2: For over 10 years, we have built trust relationships with dental practices, clinics and laboratories throughout Morocco, placing quality and service at the heart of our approach.
about.v1_desc: We only distribute products meeting the strictest standards: CE certification, ISO 13485, international approvals.
about.v2_desc: A listening team, available to answer your questions and assist you in choosing the best solutions.
about.v3_desc: Permanent watch on new technologies and regular training to present you with sector innovations.
about.v4_desc: Commitments kept: deadlines respected, authentic products, transparent invoicing without surprises.
